case_title: CACH, LLC VS. GREGORY A MARTIN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, GREGORY A SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-30-2012

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, GREGORY A

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, GREGORY A $3,676.59 PRINCIPAL, $690.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $296.14 INTEREST, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,977.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
